info.title: BeatBox API
info.description: A drum machine sandbox API for creating and exploring beat patterns. Ships with the DubStack starter template to demonstrate interactive API playground features including the drum sequencer visualizer.

get.description: Returns all pre-seeded demo beat patterns. Each pattern includes BPM, kit selection, and track data with 16-step sequences for each instrument.

parameters.name: genre
parameters.description: Filter beats by music genre tag

parameters.name: kit
parameters.description: Filter beats by drum kit ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

post.description: Creates a custom beat pattern and stores it in the current session. Each session can hold up to 10 custom beats. Custom beats are prefixed with `custom-` and persist until the session expires or is explicitly cleared via DELETE /sessions/me. Use DELETE /beats/{id} to remove individual custom beats.

requestBody.description: Beat pattern to create. Each track must contain exactly 16 steps where 1 = hit and 0 = silence.

value.message: kit must be one of: tr-808, acoustic, electronic

get.description: Returns a specific pre-seeded demo beat pattern by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a custom beat pattern from the current session. Only session-created beats (prefixed with `custom-`) can be deleted. Pre-seeded demo beats (boom-bap, trap, etc.) return 403 Forbidden. All custom beats are automatically deleted when the session expires or on logout.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Beat pattern ID to delete. Must be a custom beat (custom-* prefix).

session_beats_remaining.description: Number of custom beats still in the session

example.message: Beat "My Custom Beat" deleted from session

value.message: Beat "My Custom Beat" deleted from session

lastBeatDeleted.summary: Last custom beat deleted, session empty

403.description: Cannot delete pre-seeded demo beats. Only custom beats (custom-* prefix) can be deleted.

example.message: Cannot delete pre-seeded beat "boom-bap". Only custom beats can be deleted.

cannotDeletePreseeded.summary: Tried to delete a demo beat

value.message: Cannot delete pre-seeded beat "boom-bap". Only custom beats can be deleted.

404.description: Beat not found in current session.

example.message: Beat with id "custom-old-beat" not found in current session

post.description: Returns playback metadata for a beat pattern including timing data. Audio synthesis occurs client-side in the sequencer visualizer.

200.description: Playback metadata with track data and timing.

duration_ms.description: Total duration of one loop in milliseconds

step_duration_ms.description: Duration of each step in milliseconds

get.description: Returns all available drum kits with rich metadata for visual preview rendering. Each kit includes brand, year, genre tags, accent color, and detailed sound information.

200.description: Array of available drum kits with rich metadata.

example.name: TR-808
example.description: The legendary Roland TR-808 Rhythm Composer. Iconic analog drum machine that defined hip-hop, electro, and modern pop.

example.name: Acoustic Studio Kit
example.description: Premium acoustic drum kit with studio-quality samples. Natural warmth for rock, jazz, and pop productions.

example.name: LinnDrum LM-2
example.description: The LinnDrum LM-2 - the first drum machine with digitally sampled sounds. Defined the sound of 80s new wave and synthpop.

example.name: CR-78
example.description: The Roland CR-78 CompuRhythm - one of the first programmable drum machines. Warm analog tones that shaped disco and new wave.

get.description: Returns a specific drum kit with its full sound definitions and control parameters for tuning and decay adjustments.

200.description: Drum kit found with full details and controls.

example.name: TR-808
example.description: The legendary Roland TR-808 Rhythm Composer. Iconic analog drum machine that defined hip-hop, electro, and modern pop.

value.name: TR-808
value.description: The legendary Roland TR-808 Rhythm Composer. Iconic analog drum machine that defined hip-hop, electro, and modern pop.

value.name: LinnDrum LM-2
value.description: The LinnDrum LM-2 - the first drum machine with digitally sampled sounds. Defined the sound of 80s new wave and synthpop.

get.description: Returns all available sounds/instruments in a specific drum kit with character descriptions and sample hints.

post.description: Stops the current playback session for a beat pattern and returns session statistics including total play time and loop count.

200.description: Playback stopped successfully. Returns session statistics.

404.description: No active playback session found for this beat.

example.message: No active playback session for beat "boom-bap"

put.description: Adjusts the master volume level for a beat's playback session. Supports optional fade transition for smooth volume changes. Volume is a float from 0.0 (silent) to 1.0 (full). Demonstrates number, integer, and boolean parameter types.

requestBody.description: Volume configuration with optional fade and mute controls.

fade_applied.description: Whether a fade transition was applied

put.description: Adjusts the BPM (beats per minute) for an active beat session. Supports gradual tempo ramping over a configurable number of bars for smooth transitions between tempos.

requestBody.description: Tempo configuration with optional ramp transition.

gradualRamp.summary: Gradually ramp to 135 BPM over 4 bars

200.description: Tempo changed. Returns updated timing calculations.

step_duration_ms.description: Duration of each step at new BPM

loop_duration_ms.description: Duration of one full loop at new BPM

ramp_duration_ms.description: Total ramp transition time in ms

post.description: Exports a beat pattern in the specified format. Supports MIDI (for DAW import), WAV (audio bounce), JSON (raw data), and stems (individual track files). Optionally select specific tracks to include. Demonstrates string enum, boolean, and array of strings parameter types.

requestBody.description: Export configuration with format selection, track filtering, and output options.

200.description: Export generated successfully. Returns download link with expiry.

tracks_exported.description: List of track names included in export

example.message: Track "timpani" not found in beat "classic-rock". Available tracks: kick, snare, hihat

put.description: Adjusts parameters for an individual sound within a kit. Supports pitch tuning (semitones), decay envelope, stereo panning, mute state, and velocity. Demonstrates integer, string enum, boolean, and float parameter types in a single request body.

parameters.name: soundId
parameters.description: Sound/instrument ID within the kit (e.g. kick, snare, hihat)

requestBody.description: Sound parameter configuration. All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

tuneAndDecay.summary: Tune up 3 semitones with long decay

pannedAndMuted.summary: Hard-panned and muted for later use

example.message: Sound "triangle" not found in kit "tr-808". Available: kick, snare, hihat, clap, tom, cowbell, rimshot, conga

post.description: Creates a full mixer configuration for a kit by specifying per-channel volumes, panning, mute states, and master effects. Demonstrates array of objects, nested objects, and mixed parameter types in a single request.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Kit ID to create a mix for

requestBody.description: Full mixer configuration with per-channel settings and master effects.

example.message: Sound "triangle" is not available in kit "tr-808". Available: kick, snare, hihat, clap, tom, cowbell, rimshot, conga

get.description: Returns the current session details including all custom beats created in this session, session age, and storage usage. Each authenticated user gets an isolated session - custom beats from one user are never visible to another.

emptySession.summary: Fresh session with no custom data

example.message: No active session. Provide a valid service JWT or token.

delete.description: Explicitly clears all session data including custom beats, mixes, and playback state. This is equivalent to logging out - all custom-created resources are permanently deleted. Sessions also auto-expire after the TTL (default 1 hour of inactivity).

200.description: Session cleared. All custom data deleted.

deleted_beats.description: Number of custom beats that were deleted

deleted_mixes.description: Number of custom mixes that were deleted

session_duration_seconds.description: How long the session was active before clearing

example.message: Session cleared. All custom data deleted.

value.message: Session cleared. All custom data deleted.
Session cleared. No custom data to delete.

kit.description: Drum kit ID used for this pattern

steps.description: Number of steps in the sequence (always 16)

duration_ms.description: Duration of one loop in milliseconds

name.description: Optional name for the beat pattern

kit.description: Drum kit to use. Must be one of the available kit IDs.

Tracks.description: Track data keyed by instrument name. Each track is an array of exactly 16 steps where 1 = hit and 0 = silence. Available instruments depend on the selected kit.

Kit.description: Rich drum kit metadata for visual gallery rendering

description.description: Rich description of the kit and its historical significance
description.example: The legendary Roland TR-808 Rhythm Composer. Iconic analog drum machine that defined hip-hop, electro, and modern pop.

genreTags.description: Music genres associated with this kit

accentColor.description: Hex color code for visual theming in the gallery

KitDetail.description: Full kit details with controls for single-kit view

KitControls.description: Control parameters for adjusting kit sounds

id.description: Sound identifier used as track key in beat patterns

sampleHint.description: Suggested sample filename for audio playback

PlaybackSession.description: Playback session status and statistics returned when stopping or querying a session

beat_id.description: The beat pattern that was playing

played_loops.description: Number of complete loops played in this session

total_duration_ms.description: Total time the beat was playing in milliseconds

stopped_at_step.description: The step index (0-15) where playback was stopped

VolumeConfig.description: Volume adjustment parameters. Demonstrates number (float), integer, and boolean types.

level.description: Master volume level (0.0 = silent, 1.0 = full volume)

fade_ms.description: Fade transition duration in milliseconds. 0 = instant change.

mute.description: Mute toggle. When true, volume is silenced but level is preserved for unmuting.

TempoConfig.description: Tempo change configuration. Demonstrates integer, boolean, and conditional integer types.

ramp.description: Gradually transition to new tempo instead of instant change

ramp_bars.description: Number of bars over which to ramp the tempo. Only used when ramp is true.

SoundConfig.description: Individual sound parameter configuration. Demonstrates integer, string enum, boolean, and float types in one object.

tune.description: Pitch tuning in semitones (-12 = one octave down, +12 = one octave up)

decay.description: Decay envelope percentage (0 = short punch, 100 = long sustain)

mute.description: Mute this sound without removing it from the mix

velocity.description: Hit velocity/loudness multiplier (0.0 = ghost note, 1.0 = full hit)

MixConfig.description: Full mixer configuration for a drum kit. Demonstrates array of objects, nested objects, and mixed parameter types in a single request.

channels.description: Per-sound channel configurations. Each channel maps to one kit sound.

master_volume.description: Master output volume applied after channel mixing

ChannelConfig.description: Configuration for a single mixer channel (one sound/instrument)

sound.description: Sound/instrument ID to configure (must exist in the kit)

pan.description: Stereo pan position for this channel

EffectsConfig.description: Audio effects configuration for the master bus. Demonstrates boolean, float, and string enum types.

reverb.description: Enable reverb effect on the master bus

reverb_amount.description: Reverb wet/dry mix (0.0 = fully dry, 1.0 = fully wet)

compression.description: Dynamic range compression preset for the master bus

eq_low.description: Low frequency EQ boost/cut in decibels

eq_high.description: High frequency EQ boost/cut in decibels

ExportConfig.description: Beat export configuration with format selection and track filtering. Demonstrates string enum, array of strings, booleans, and optional string types.

format.description: Export file format. MIDI for DAW import, WAV for audio bounce, JSON for raw data, stems for individual track audio files.

tracks.description: Specific tracks to include in the export. If omitted, all tracks are exported.

include_metadata.description: Include BPM, kit info, and timestamps in export metadata

normalize.description: Normalize audio levels in WAV/stems export to prevent clipping

filename.description: Custom filename for the export (without extension). Auto-generated if not provided.

Session.description: User session containing all custom-created resources. Each authenticated user gets an isolated session. Custom beats and mixes are ephemeral - they persist until session expiry (1 hour inactivity) or explicit logout via DELETE /sessions/me. Sessions are unique per customer - no cross-session data access.

expires_at.description: When the session will auto-expire if no activity

ttl_seconds.description: Session time-to-live in seconds (resets on activity)

custom_beats.description: Custom beat patterns created in this session

custom_beats_count.description: Number of custom beats in session

custom_beats_limit.description: Maximum custom beats allowed per session

custom_mixes.description: Custom mixer configurations created in this session

custom_mixes_count.description: Number of custom mixes in session

serviceJwt.description: HS256-signed service JWT. Required claims: iss=dubstack-content-service, aud=dubstack-beatbox-sandbox, exp (short TTL). Generated by content-service broker for each playground execution request.

serviceToken.name: X-Service-Token
serviceToken.description: Pre-shared static service token for internal backend-to-backend calls. Alternative to JWT for simpler service integrations.

tags.name: Beats
tags.description: Create, explore, and export drum beat patterns. Each beat is a 16-step sequence with multiple instrument tracks. Supports filtering by genre, kit, and BPM range.

tags.name: Playback
tags.description: Control active beat playback sessions. Start, stop, adjust volume and tempo in real-time. Demonstrates number (float), integer, and boolean parameter types.

tags.name: Kits
tags.description: Browse available drum kits and their sounds. Each kit includes brand, year, genre tags, accent color, and detailed sound definitions for Web Audio synthesis.

tags.name: Mixer
tags.description: Configure individual sounds and create full mix presets. Adjust tuning, decay, panning, velocity, and master effects. Demonstrates array of objects, nested objects, and string enum types.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Manage ephemeral user sessions. Each customer gets an isolated session that stores their custom beats and mixes. Sessions auto-expire after 1 hour of inactivity, or can be explicitly cleared (logout). Custom resources are unique per customer and never shared.
